pi_items.source: OpenBCI GUI documentation confirms the Layout button exists in the top right to rearrange widgets. Task instructions confirm this is the target interaction.
Task description explicitly instructs changing the layout to a 2x2 grid showing 4 widget panels.
Subjective metric. Cannot be strictly verified, though the task only requires a few clicks.

privileged_info_summary: The environment runs OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 with a built-in synthetic EEG data session. The agent must use the 'Layout' dropdown in the top right toolbar to select a 4-panel (2x2 grid) layout.
